summary: Complete rebrand testing from upmuch to earnrm CRM. Backend API correctly branded as 'earnrm CRM API'. Frontend shows earnrm logo, 'Your CRM that pAIs you back' slogan with purple AI highlighting, purple buttons (#A100FF), and support@earnrm.com in footer. Fixed remaining 'upmuch' references in testimonials, CTA section, and dashboard mobile header.

✅ User authentication and session management working
